description: Continuation of a research project conducted under the direction of a faculty member.
preAndCorequisites: • Declared Honours in one of the Chemistry programs.
supplementalNotes:
• Credit will be granted for only one of CHEM 499B, CHEM 498B, CHEM 499.
  • Enrollment in 499A and 499B does not automatically confer Honours program status. CHEM 499A and CHEM 499B are "tied" courses and must be taken in consecutive terms except with permission of the department. Credit for CHEM 499A will be assigned only upon successful completion of both courses.
title: Honours Thesis II
